div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 49px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/create-component-onboarding-jira
Interactive Q&A (ODH vs RHOAI)
Generate component_onboarding_details.yaml
Validate against JSON Schema
Dockerfile digest check (RHOAI)
Create or update Jira ticket

Fetch Jira issue details
Download YAML attachment
Schema + branch cross-validation

Update Jira labels and status
